audit_items.proof_trace: Every pointer dereference in utf-8-conv.c is preceded by an explicit NULL guard: input pointers are checked at function entry (e.g., L96, L133, L280, L381, L426, L459), output pointers are guarded with `if (ptr)` before deref (L114, L134, L157, L383, L428), malloc results are checked before use (L391, L468), and the LDAP_UTF8_CHARLEN2 macro is only reached after the caller has already validated the pointer is non-NULL. The proof holds on all code paths.
